sentence: Yourow finds the quichous last — after everyone else has moved on.

wombos.definition: Quirky and niche, but also intriguingly curious — something that makes you want to know more. A step beyond quiche: not just odd, but fascinatingly odd.
A descriptor for someone who moves or processes things at a noticeably slow pace. Used as a direct address or description: 'you're slow.'
wombos.example: Sorry, I forgot you were yourow — I'll slow down.
